'''ngavuyu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:pyewipe|pyewipe]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ng-v-y
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:pyewipe|pyewipe]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| ngavuyu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || ngæviyith || ngæviyij || ngæviyish || ngæviyi
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || ngavuvuyuth || ngavuvuyuj || ngavuvuyush || ngavuvuyu
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || ngavuyuth || ngavuyuj || ngavuyush || ngavuyu
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || ngavufyufth || ngavufyufj || ngavufyufsh || ngavufyuf
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || ngavuyuthu || ngavuyuju || ngavuyushu || ngavuyuku
|-
| [[Patient]] || ngavuyuth || ngavuyuj || ngavuyush || ngavuyu
|-
| [[Possessive]] || ngavuyuthul || ngavuyujul || ngavuyushul || ngavuyukul
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || ngavuyuuthuthu || ngavuyuujuju || ngavuyuushushu || ngavuyuuku
|-
| [[Dative]] || ngavuyuthun || ngavuyujun || ngavuyushun || ngavuyukun
|-
| [[Speaker]] || ngavuyuthuoro || ngavuyujuoro || ngavuyushuoro || ngavuyukuoro
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
[[Category:Words c2e237e]]
{{wordpage|d176386}}
